PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lisa Zaragoza for Brian Hom.

Ms. Zaragoza stated that it is her understanding that the Decedent was not competent up until his date of death. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for July 24, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
